question: A line plot shows lengths in inches: 1/4 has 2 Xs, 1/2 has 3 Xs, 3/4 has 1 X. How many items were measured?
A line plot shows: 1/2 inch (4 Xs), 1 inch (3 Xs), 1 1/2 inches (2 Xs). What is the most common length?
solution: 1/2 inch appears most often with 4 Xs.

question: On a line plot, 3/4 has 5 Xs and 1/4 has 2 Xs. How many more data points are at 3/4 than at 1/4?
A line plot of ribbon lengths shows: 1/8 (1 X), 2/8 (3 Xs), 3/8 (2 Xs). Which length appears least?
You measured 4 worms: 1/2 inch, 3/4 inch, 1/2 inch, 1 inch. How many Xs go above 1/2 on the line plot?
A line plot shows: 1/4 (2 Xs), 1/2 (4 Xs), 3/4 (3 Xs), 1 (1 X). What is the total length of all items combined?
A line plot shows caterpillar lengths: 1/2 (3 Xs), 1 (5 Xs), 1 1/2 (4 Xs), 2 (2 Xs). How many caterpillars were measured?
A line plot shows: 1/8 (1 X), 3/8 (4 Xs), 5/8 (2 Xs), 7/8 (1 X). What is the difference between the longest and shortest measurements?
A line plot shows nail lengths: 1/4 inch (3 Xs), 1/2 inch (5 Xs), 3/4 inch (2 Xs). If you laid all the 1/2-inch nails end to end, how long would the line be?
A line plot shows: 1 1/4 (2 Xs), 1 1/2 (3 Xs), 1 3/4 (4 Xs), 2 (1 X). What fraction of the data points are at 1 3/4?
A line plot shows leaf widths: 1/4 (1 X), 1/2 (3 Xs), 3/4 (4 Xs), 1 (2 Xs). What is the total width of all leaves combined?
A line plot shows amounts of rainfall in inches: 0 (2 Xs), 1/4 (3 Xs), 1/2 (5 Xs), 3/4 (3 Xs), 1 (1 X). What is the average rainfall?
A line plot shows pencil lengths: 4 1/2 (2 Xs), 5 (3 Xs), 5 1/2 (4 Xs), 6 (1 X). What is the median length?
hints: 10 data points. 5th value = 5, 6th value = 5 1/2. Median = average of 5th and 6th.

question: A line plot shows insect lengths: 1/8 (2 Xs), 1/4 (4 Xs), 3/8 (6 Xs), 1/2 (3 Xs). How much longer is the total of all 1/2-inch insects than the total of all 1/8-inch insects?
A line plot shows seed growth in inches after 1 week: 1/4 (3 Xs), 3/8 (2 Xs), 1/2 (5 Xs), 5/8 (4 Xs), 3/4 (1 X). What is the total growth of all seeds?
